headline: Prosecutors used ChatGPT logs as evidence in the Palisades fire trial
summary: ChatGPT logs were used as evidence in an arson trial. Jonathan Rinderknecht faces charges for a deadly LA wildfire. Prosecutors cited AI conversations alongside other digital evidence.

headline: Nest's quest to fix your thermostat
summary: Nest's origin story is a classic tech myth. Tony Fadell, iPhone creator, returned to innovate thermostats. The company aimed to reinvent home climate control.

headline: Ad-free streaming is a luxury now
summary: Ad-free streaming has evolved into a premium offering. Streaming services once offered an ad-free alternative to cable. The industry trend now pushes users towards ad-supported tiers.

headline: TMD's keyless bike lock is a $280 solution to a $60 problem
summary: TMD introduces a new $280 keyless smart bike lock. It aims to justify high cost with unique features and certification. The lock originates from a company previously securing ATMs.

headline: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 Sets Fall 2026 Release With First Look at 4 New Characters
summary: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is slated for a Fall 2026 release. Netflix revealed initial details for the anime sequel. Four new characters have been unveiled.

headline: The Invincible VS Devs Would Love a Mortal Kombat Crossover
summary: Invincible VS developers are open to diverse collaborations. They expressed interest in a Mortal Kombat crossover. Future updates could include new IPs and genres.

headline: GTA 6 Scalpers Are Finding Buyers on eBay Despite Rockstar's Commitment to a Digital Release
summary: GTA 6 scalpers are selling pre-orders on eBay. Buyers are paying extra despite no physical release. Rockstar Games has committed to a digital-only launch.

headline: Street Fighter 6 Devs Have No Current Plans to Make Any Major Adjustments to System Mechanics | Evo 2026
summary: Street Fighter 6 developers won't adjust core mechanics soon. This decision was announced at Evo 2026. Director Nakayama and Producer Matsumoto discussed the game's future.

headline: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
summary: Two boys were rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble. Rescuers spent hours digging by hand. Many residents are still searching amidst delayed heavy machinery.

headline: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
summary: A plane carrying skydivers crashed in eastern France. Eleven people, including the pilot, died in the incident. Local officials confirmed the fatalities.

headline: Senior Labour figures say party is united behind Andy Burnham
summary: Senior Labour figures claim unity behind Andy Burnham. Lucy Powell and Steve Reed voiced support. Labour MPs reportedly favor Burnham's coronation over a leadership contest.

headline: How Bellingham became Tuchel's most important player
summary: Jude Bellingham has become key to Thomas Tuchel's strategy. His starting position was initially debated. Bellingham is now integral to the England team's play.
